docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS ROBERT
CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION & NOTICE OF HEARING SET FOR: FEB. 28, 1992 AT 9:00 A.M. DEPT. 6.
ORDER ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION DENIED BY JUDGE JOSEPH DESMOND.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,308.00 AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS ROBERT
W RIT OF 2/4/92 RETURNED FULLY SATIFIED AS TO POSSESSION ONLY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,273.00 FILED BY KUSTER GERHARD AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS ROBERT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS ROBERT DIMMISSED W/O PREJUDICE.NO APPEARANCE BY PLT. CCP 117.4,117.41 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUSTER GERHARD HEARING SET FOR NOV-08-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF NOV-08-1991, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-08-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-13-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-13-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-02-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUSTER GERHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDWARDS ROBERT $3,273.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,281.00, 665 EDDY STREET #51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
